mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: Pierre-Robin sequence, high palate, downslanting palpebral fissures

hypoplastic clavicles leading to posterior rib gaps and caries due to delayed eruption of permanent teeth
short stature with disproportionately small thorax, 11 pairs of ribs
blue sclerae, caries, scoliosis (may imply structural issues with L5 vertebra)
joint hypermobility which can lead to feeding difficulties
bone dysplasias including possible involvement of cervical spine
skeletal anomalies such as butterfly vertebrae, cardiovascular abnormalities
long limbs, pectus excavatum (which may be associated with respiratory difficulty)
